response.justification: While Bogdan is an accomplished engineer with strong fundamentals and 15+ years of diverse experience, he lacks the critical technical requirements for this role. With only ~6 months of C++ experience (2014-2015) versus the required 8-12 years, and no background in industrial automation, IoT, embedded systems, or security standards (IEC 62443, SDL), he would face a steep learning curve in both the primary language and the domain. His recent work spans TypeScript/Node.js web platforms and data systems, not C++ systems development.
strengths: Strong CS fundamentals from MIT with proven ability to rapidly master diverse technology stacks and domains
Hands-on experience building high-performance, low-latency systems with microservices architecture (Dunnhumby: async I/O, caching, real-time data handling at scale)
Demonstrated mentoring capability and knowledge-sharing through Code Kata organization, workshops, and open-source platform leadership
concerns: Minimal C++ depth: only ~6 months of direct experience (National Instruments 2014-2015); primary expertise is TypeScript, D Language, and JavaScript
No industrial automation, IoT, embedded systems, or protocol experience (MQTT, Modbus TCP/IP, IEC 61850, OPC UA, DNP 3.0)
No background in Secure Development Lifecycle, IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity standards, or application security—explicit core competencies for this role

key_factors.factor: C++ expertise gap (6 months vs. 8-12 years required)
Missing industrial/IoT domain and security standards background
Strong fundamentals and proven ability to learn complex systems
